name: Brave Bison Group plc
summary: Brave Bison Group plc, a social video company, engages in the creation, distribution, and monetization of online video content in Europe, the Asia-Pacific, and internationally. The company provides an online video distribution and marketing network. It helps content owners, operators, brands, publishers, and advertisers to build and engage online audiences; and enables its clients to commercialize their content to audiences on various online video platforms, such as YouTube, Facebook, and Snapchat. The company was formerly known as Rightster Group Plc and changed its name to Brave Bison Group Plc in May 2016. Brave Bison Group plc was founded in 2011 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
